summary: Bulk remove company users from projects
description: This endpoint allows company users to be bulk removed from multiple projects.

schema.description: One key for each user ID passed in

userId.description: One key for each project ID for that nested user ID

projectId.description: Success if the user ID / project ID combination succeeded, failure if not

users.description: Array of existing company users with a project id that they will be removed from. The maximum amount per request is 1000 user_id, project_id duplets. If more than 1000 objects are sent then a worke...

user_id.description: The ID of the user to remove

project_id.description: The ID of project to add the user to remove from
